---
image: "images/loreen_circle.jpeg"
title: ""
#image: "images/loreen_cartoon_black.jpeg"
#theme: theme.css
links:
  - label: UniBas
    url: "https://psychologie.unibas.ch/de/personen/loreen-tisdall"
  - label: ORCID iD
    url: "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6303-6148"
  - label: Google Scholar
    url: "https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=o8ce3OwAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao"
  # - label: Twitter
  #   url: "https://twitter.com/LoreenTisdall"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/loreen-tisdall-54937431/"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:loreen.tisdall@unibas.ch"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# install.packages("postcards")
library(postcards)
```

```{css}
a {
    color: #E57248;
}

a:hover {
    color: white;
    background-color: #E57248;
}
```


### Hello!

I am a Senior Researcher at the Center for Cognitive and Decision Sciences at the University of Basel, Switzerland. My research explores how people make decisions under uncertainty, with a particular focus on risk preference, safety perception, and lifespan development. I investigate the cognitive and affective mechanisms underlying individual differences in decision making and how these insights can inform legal and societal challenges.

---

*How can we use virtual reality to improve research on risk and decision making?* [Read more](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chbr.2025.100889).

*How do we measure decision making across the lifespan?* [Read more here](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41562-024-02085-2) and [here](https://doi.org/10.1093/geronb/gbae092).

*Can brain structure predict clinically relevant outcomes?* [Read more](https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2116703119).

*How can we make neuroimaging research more robust and reproducible?* [Read more](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-020-2314-9).
